title: Senior Accounts Executive/ Assistant Accountant (ID: 693965)
description:
Brief Summary:
Join a dynamic finance team where you can leverage your accounting skills and enhance operational efficiency. This role offers a challenging opportunity to manage accounts payable and receivable, along with general ledger functions.

Responsibilities:

  • Maintain and update vendor and customer records accurately.

  • Verify and enter invoices into the accounting system, ensuring alignment with purchase orders and contracts.

  • Process vendor payments through internet banking transfers and host-to-host solutions.

  • Conduct reconciliations for accounts payable and receivable, addressing any discrepancies.

  • Prepare comprehensive monthly reports for both accounts payable and receivable for management review.

  • Maintain detailed records of all transactions and relevant financial documentation.

  • Assist in preparing schedules for year-end accrual and deferral of expenses and revenues.

  • Support internal and external audits, including tax inquiries related to GST and corporate tax.

  • Involve in ad-hoc projects and other assignments as required.

Requirements:

  • Degree in Accounting or Finance.

  • Minimum of 3 years of relevant work experience in accounting or audit.

  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and time management abilities; keen attention to detail.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint, with a strong understanding of accounting software.

  • Familiarity with S4/HANA Cloud Public Edition is advantageous.

  • Flexibility to be assigned to various accounting functions as needed.

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click on “Apply Now”. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

EA License No: 01C4394 (PERSOL Singapore Pte Ltd)

You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.

For more information, please visit www.persolsingapore.com
